nasb.text: “Now you, son of man, listen to what I am speaking to you; do not be rebellious like that rebellious house. Open your mouth and eat what I am giving you.”

esv.text: “But you, son of man, hear what I say to you. Be not rebellious like that rebellious house; open your mouth and eat what I give you.”

cnv.text: “人子啊！至於你，你要聽我對你講的話。不要叛逆我，像那叛逆的民族一樣。張開你的口，把我賜給你的吃下去！”

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要听我对你说的话，不要像他们那样叛逆，要张开口吃我赐给你的。”
